items.title: Approve the CardStats product contract and architecture baseline
items.nextAction: Implement the approved representative vertical slice.
verification: Founder explicitly approved Decision 0002 on 17 July 2026.
Product contract and ADR 0001 marked accepted for the representative vertical slice.

items.title: Implement the approved synthetic CardStats representative vertical slice
items.nextAction: Retain this only as a technical validation baseline while the real catalog work replaces its synthetic public UI.
verification: Reviewed PostgreSQL migration applied; schema is current and deterministic synthetic seed restored.
npm run check passed lint, strict TypeScript, four policy assertions, one database publication integration test, and the Next.js production build.
Playwright passed five desktop/mobile checks with one intentional duplicate-workflow skip, including axe, 375px, landscape, 200% text, reduced motion, touch targets, and audit-to-publication flow.
CardStats UI-UX-PRO-MAX design-system workflow, canonical checklist, and visual inspection completed.
Protected Vercel preview deployed from an explicit secret-free manifest; hosted reads use the complete 24-claim synthetic snapshot and the research mutation workbench is unavailable.
Authenticated live smoke checks passed home, program, comparison, and the read-only research-unavailable state.
items.completion: Technical validation completed on 17 July 2026. The founder rejected the synthetic public product direction and authorized real-source catalog ingestion and redesign instead.

items.title: Build the real CardStats catalog, evidence pipeline, and analytics-first public product
items.nextAction: Review PR 8 and its protected Vercel preview; merge only after founder approval.
verification: Safe AST ingestion extracted 42 minimal discovery records from the public CryptoAgg application bundle without executing source JavaScript.
PaymentScan adapter is restricted to documented bearer-token API routes and refuses public ingestion without explicit republication rights.
ESLint, strict TypeScript, 12 unit/ingestion assertions, Prisma validation and generation, and Next.js production build passed.
Playwright passed 8 desktop/mobile catalog, profile, comparison, analytics, accessibility, responsive, reduced-motion, and touch-target checks after two caught accessibility defects were fixed.
Desktop home/analytics and 375px mobile catalog were visually inspected against the updated CardStats design system.
Secret-free protected Vercel preview deployed and authenticated smoke checks passed all public routes plus the disabled hosted research workspace.
Founder explicitly approved the reviewed migration; Prisma applied it successfully, confirmed both migrations current, and the database publication integration workflow passed.
Idempotent importer created one quarantined run with 42 DISCOVERED candidates, reused it on rerun, and confirmed zero PROMOTED candidates.
Complete Vitest suite passed 15 assertions across unit, ingestion, and database integration files.

Read-only official-source collection validated 24 scoped observations from 11 MetaMask, ether.fi, and Gnosis Pay pages; Gnosis Pay uses its public Zendesk article API when automated human-page reads return 403.
Candidate-evidence schema validates, official-source definition tests pass, the complete suite passes 17 assertions, and the 49-page production build passes.
Founder explicitly approved migration 20260717194000_candidate_evidence; Prisma applied it successfully and reports all three migrations current.
Collector persisted 24 observations across 11 official-source artifacts; MetaMask has 8, ether.fi 7, and Gnosis Pay 9, all three candidates are VERIFYING, and zero candidates are PROMOTED.

A repeated collection exposed volatile raw-markup hashes; the guarded repair removed 5 duplicate artifacts, normalized visible-text hashing now proves stable across repeated fetches, and final counts remain 24 evidence rows and 11 artifacts.
Complete Vitest suite passes 18 assertions and the 49-page production build passes after the idempotency fix.

MetaMask, ether.fi, and Gnosis Pay now use pinned official issuer marks with source page, asset URL, dimensions, observation date, rights basis, and byte hash; all other competitor avatars remain discovery-only.
Priority profiles expose 24 official observations in a separate review-pending ledger while retaining zero verified fields and zero promoted candidates.

Vitest passes 20 assertions, the 49-page build passes, Playwright passes all 8 desktop/mobile checks plus the targeted mobile rerun, and protected preview dpl_8oqTbTFrms3PupiCSUufcH18vuqG is ready with authenticated 200 smoke checks.

Removed repeated discovery-warning and Unverified labels from public components; replaced all native selects with one accessible custom listbox; lint, strict TypeScript, 20 tests, the 49-page build, 8 desktop/mobile Playwright checks, axe, touch targets, visual inspection, and authenticated preview smoke checks pass.

Profile-to-comparison selection now uses an accessible searchable dialog and shareable URL state; the semantic desktop/mobile table, 23-test unit/integration suite, 50-page production build, 10 Playwright checks, axe, landscape, reduced-motion, localized scroll, and 200% text checks pass.
Protected preview dpl_G5xxfvXCbRgBXYrFgQoEGbdDD47G is READY; authenticated MetaMask profile and shareable comparison smoke checks return HTTP 200.

Program-first plan and benefit modeling keeps Ready as one card with Lite/Metal selectors on profile and comparison; Ready/Wirex benefits use current official pages, 24 Vitest assertions pass, the production build passes, and all 12 desktop/mobile Playwright checks pass.
Protected preview dpl_m58LFgYqfNDJKDrULXU1m1SgWyg2 is READY; authenticated Ready Metal profile and Ready/Wirex/MetaMask plan-aware comparison smoke checks return HTTP 200.

Official product pages, pricing, help centers, FAQs, terms, and lifecycle notices were audited for all 42 catalog programs; unresolved, stale, regional, image-only, and time-limited evidence remains explicitly qualified.

Every catalog program now has a tested research record with a corrected program name, direct official destination when identity is established, current availability, and product-scope explanation; TapX intentionally has no website CTA.

Eight source-backed one-dimensional choices now work as plan, membership, subscription, or account-tier selectors; Playwright passes all 12 desktop/mobile accessibility and responsive checks, 28 Vitest assertions pass, and the 50-page production build passes.

Protected preview deployment 5502478963 is READY at https://cardstats-65d7f4rha-aterli.vercel.app; authenticated smoke checks return 200 and contain the expected MetaMask, TapX, and Ready/MetaMask/RedotPay comparison content.

The database now contains 60 discovery candidates, 280 scoped observations from 64 official sources for 52 candidates, 8 explicit blockers, 38 plan dimensions, and 125 options; zero candidates were promoted or published.
One database-backed runtime projection replaces local research modules and keeps Ready as one program while exposing Solflare, Trustee Plus, Kraken, Bybit, and 55 other cards.

ESLint, strict TypeScript, Prisma validation/generation, 26 deterministic tests, the Next.js Webpack production compile, and both harness verification commands pass; the restricted sandbox blocked only database connectivity and Turbopack's internal helper port.
Founder approved sensitive Vercel Preview and Production database access and the production merge; PR 6 squash-merged as f7aad76.
Vercel production deployment dpl_JCQ7h1Es7CP6kkNWpvA69JdM7izn is ready; six authenticated production smoke routes returned HTTP 200 with expected database-backed card, tier, and comparison content.

The isolated UI/data repair passes ESLint, strict TypeScript, 28 Vitest checks, a PostgreSQL-backed production build, desktop/mobile axe checks, mobile table containment, landscape, reduced motion, 44px targets, and 200% text reflow; affected Ready tier checks pass in both browser projects.
PR 7 was squash-merged as 0b526522 before the new UX work began.

The isolated live-catalog and plan-selector branch passes ESLint, strict TypeScript, all 28 Vitest checks with PostgreSQL access, the production build, all 12 desktop/mobile Playwright checks, axe, touch targets, horizontal table containment, landscape, reduced motion, and 200% text reflow.
The catalog, Ready profile, and Ready/MetaMask comparison were visually inspected on desktop and Pixel 5 after the ui-ux-pro-max and design-taste-frontend audits.

PR 8 is open at https://github.com/ensp1re/crypto-aggregator/pull/8; its Vercel check passes and authenticated preview smoke checks return HTTP 200 for catalog, Ready profile, and Ready/MetaMask comparison routes.
